title: catalog needs exclusion semantics for unlabeled visual blocks
evidence: smoke H7 reports 573 empty figure/table captions and catalog audit shows many unlabeled visual blocks embedded between prose or exercises (for example ch03 problem 3.2.5, ch04 body[30], ch20 body[8]). extract_rules.yaml can only tune figure_caption_merge/main_re; it cannot mark non-captioned visuals as excluded or assign semantic ids selectively.
proposal: Add a schema-level way to classify unlabeled image/table blocks as non-catalog visuals or excluded, or teach catalog/build step to auto-suppress unlabeled visuals without explicit Figure/Table captions. This would let audit-book reach smoke green without per-book engine edits.
